prompt: What is the meaning of life?
system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant with access to tools. Only use tools when necessary — answer directly if you can.

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get current weather for a location

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search the internal knowledge base for relevant documents

function.name: query_database
function.description: Execute a read-only SQL query on the customer database

expected_output: The assistant should answer this philosophical question directly without calling any tools, as no tool is relevant for this type of question.

prompt: Schedule a meeting with marco.rossi@eni.com and lucia.bianchi@eni.com tomorrow at 2pm for 1 hour about Q3 budget review.
system_prompt: You are an executive assistant. Use calendar tools to manage scheduling.

function.name: send_email
function.description: Send an email to a recipient

prompt: How many orders did customer ID 4582 place last month, and what was the total value?
system_prompt: You are a data analyst assistant. Use the database query tool to retrieve data. Write efficient SQL queries.

function.name: query_database
function.description: Execute a read-only SQL query on the customer database

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search the internal knowledge base for relevant documents

expected_output: {"tool_calls": [{"function": "query_database", "arguments": {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count, SUM(total_value) as total_value FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 4582 AND order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)", "database": "orders"}}]}

prompt: Find all open support tickets for Acme Corp, then send a summary email to their account manager at am@company.com
system_prompt: You are a customer success assistant. You can query databases and send emails. Complete multi-step tasks sequentially.

function.name: query_database
function.description: Execute a read-only SQL query on the customer database

function.name: send_email
function.description: Send an email to a recipient

function.name: search_knowledge_base
function.description: Search the internal knowledge base for relevant documents

expected_output: {"tool_calls": [{"function": "query_database", "arguments": {"sql": "SELECT ticket_id, subject, status, created_date FROM support_tickets WHERE customer_name = 'Acme Corp' AND status = 'open' ORDER BY created_date DESC", "database": "customers"}}], "note": "After receiving query results, should call send_email with the summary"}

system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. If the user's request is ambiguous, ask clarifying questions before using tools.

function.name: send_email
function.description: Send an email to a recipient

expected_output: The assistant should NOT call any tool. Instead, it should ask for clarification: What should the reminder be about? When should it be set? This request is too vague to create a calendar event.
